Mimic Engine.Notes: -20 Perception, Appear on Sensors as different type of Vessel

Ghost Field.Notes: -20% Ballistic Skill to Target Ship; -30% Ballistic for Lance Weapons and Hit & Run Actions; Cannot work at the same time as Void Shields

Shard Cannon Battery.Notes: Can never become Unpowered; If Destroyed 2d5 additional Hull Integrity Damage

Dark Cannon.Notes: If Hit, -15% Ballistic Skill during following Round

Energy Drain Matrix.Notes: If Hit, -1 Speed or -5 Manoeuvrability per Attack; Lasts 2 Rounds

Runecaster.Notes: Reduces time dilation by half. +20 to all navigate warp tests

Micro Laser Defence Grid.Notes: Wall of Light: Increase the ship’s turret rating by 2.External: This Component does not require hull space.Although it is external, it can only be destroyed or damagedby a Critical Hit.

Gravity Sails.Notes:
The Currents of Space: A starship with this Componentgains +1 Speed and +5 Manoeuvrability.
External: This Component does not require hull space.Although it is external, it can only be destroyed or damagedby a Critical Hit.

Chameleon Hull.Notes: -10 Tech-Use changed Hull Colours/Markings; -20% Tech-Use to Program additional Patterns; External Component

Grav Repulsors.Notes: Reduce Hull Integrity Damage by 1-3 against Slow Moving Ordinance; External Component

Shadowfield.Notes: Darkened Craft: This Component grants a +20 bonus to the Silent Running Manoeuvre. Any Active Augury or Focused Augury Extended Action attempted against the vessel suffers a –20 penalty. Rolling Fog: All ships firing at a ship with a functioning Shadowfield suffer a –20 to their Ballistic Skill Tests. Any Pilot Tests to perform Hit and Run attacks suffer a –30. Energetic Interference: A ship with a Shadowfield must choose whether it is using its Void Shields or Shadowfield at the beginning of combat.

Warp Disrupter.Notes: Pskyer 2d5 Damage, reduced by Toughness, 1d5-1 Fatigue; -10% Focus Power; -10% x DoS for Warp Communication

Recovery Chambers.Notes: Lightly Damaged Patients Pass Medicae 1/hour; Heavily/Critically Damaged Patients Pass Medicae 1/day; Next Game Session, if Fate Point spent 1-2 has no effect

Warp Gate Map.Notes: Navigation (Warp) to Locate; -20% Navigation (Warp) to Traverse; On Failure, vessel went somewhere else

Xenos Librarium.Notes: A collection of Xenos writings and common artefacts has been compiled aboard the vessel. The very presence of these objects constitutes a heretical offence to all but the most curious and compassionate members of the Inquisition. Alien Tomes: Any Forbidden Lore Tests that the gamemaster deems applicable receive a +10 bonus when made aboard this vessel.

Living Metal Structure.Notes: The ship recovers one hull integrity per game turn

Dream chambers.Notes: These chambers constructed from an odd bonelike materiel, allows users to experience concious dreams where they can wrestle and appease their subconcious. Characters may use this facility during downtime, in which they must pass a willpower test. If sucessful they appease their subconcious and lose 1d5 insanity. If they fail, their subconcious rebels and they gain 1 insanity point.
